title: Print and inspect all structural parts
description: Print the base, shoulder, elbow, wrist, gripper, and camera mounts. Remove supports, check bearing pockets, and keep matching left-right parts together.

title: Install the base bearing and first motor
description: Seat the 6812 bearing in the base, install the first drive motor, and verify the rotating stage moves freely before fastening.

title: Build the shoulder motor stack
description: Slide the shoulder motors into the printed casing, route the Feetech cables, and loosely fasten before final alignment.

title: Attach link 2 and link 3
description: Fit the upper-arm links onto the shoulder output, add dowels or sleeves where called out, and confirm the joint range is clear.

title: Install the elbow drive
description: Insert the elbow motor, align the horn or output spline, and fasten the housing without pinching cables.

title: Assemble the forearm link
description: Join the forearm shells, add bearings and inserts, then check that the cable path remains serviceable.

title: Build the 3 DOF wrist
description: Install the wrist motors, align the wrist roll and pitch axes, and confirm there is no printed-part interference.

title: Assemble the PincOpen gripper
description: Fit the cam, rods, pins, sleeves, and fingertip parts. The gripper should open and close smoothly before mounting.

title: Mount head and wrist cameras
description: Install the standardized head and wrist cameras so datasets match the expected GEM physical setup.

title: Wire power, bus board, USB, and emergency stop
description: Connect the 24 V PSU, buck converters, serial bus board, USB hub, and emergency stop. Label each motor cable before closing the arm.

title: Build and test the leader arm
description: Assemble the low-cost leader arm, confirm its joint directions, and verify follower motion before collecting data.

title: Calibrate GEM in LeRobot
description: Switch to the LeRobot gem branch, calibrate motors and cameras, then record a short dataset to validate the complete build.
